name: realtime-voice-agent-starter
description: Realtime Voice Agent Kit: TypeScript starter kit for WebRTC, telephony, realtime model APIs, STT/TTS pipelines, barge-in, handoff, evals, and post-call workflows.

scripts.build:libs: npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice run build && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-adapters run build
scripts.dev: npm run build:libs && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-server run dev
scripts.build: npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice run build && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-adapters run build && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-server run build && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-evals run build && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-dev-console run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice run typecheck && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice run build && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-adapters run typecheck && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-adapters run build && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-server run typecheck && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-evals run typecheck && npm -w @inferensys/realtime-voice-dev-console run typecheck
